## Validation

- [ ] `./build.sh Compile` or `./build.ps1 Compile`
- [ ] `./build.sh Test` or `./build.ps1 Test`
- [ ] Added or updated tests for behavior changes
- [ ] Updated XML docs for public API changes
- [ ] Updated package `README.md` files for public behavior/setup changes
- [ ] No package versions were added directly to `.csproj` files
